title: To G. C. And R. L.
content:
'Twas you, or I, or he, or all together,
    'Twas one, both, three of them, they know not whether;
    This, I believe, between us great or small,
    You, I, he, wrote it not 'twas Churchill's all.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Oliver Goldsmith delivers a powerful performance in "To G. C. And R. L."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
